bead.title: test: close graph traversal correctness gaps
bead.description:
Context: TP-001/STP-023, STP-024, and STP-025 still have UNTESTED graph traversal rows. Axon's structured graph/tabular promise requires safe path projection, cycle termination, dangling-target handling, multiple-path short-circuiting, alternating link types, and hidden-policy path non-disclosure.

In-scope files: focused tests and implementation in `crates/axon-api/` and `crates/axon-cypher/` for traversal/path behavior.
Out-of-scope: UI rendering, MCP tool metadata, or benchmark ratchets.
Implementation hint: prefer backend scenario tests over mocked storage; cite each new assertion with `@covers US-023-AC2`, `US-023-AC3`, `US-024-AC4`, `US-025-AC2`, `US-025-AC3`, and `US-025-AC4` as applicable.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-api` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-cypher` passes.
3. The executable @covers scanner reports coverage for every UNTESTED row closed from STP-023, STP-024, and STP-025.
4. The affected STP rows are updated from UNTESTED only when backed by passing cited tests.
